title: Metro Madrid 2000 Series - MTR/NTE RP
description: This resource pack is an addon for the Minecraft Transit Railway mod with NTE mod. It adds the 2000 (A & B) series of the Madrid Metro in the game.
body:
# 🇪🇸 MetroMadrid 2000 series
## NTE Required

The 2000 series is a series of mobile units of the Madrid Metro built by CAF during the 1980s and 1990s, and which provide service on narrow gauge lines.

Currently, it is the most numerous series of all those that circulate on the Network. They provide service on lines 1 and 5 of the network.

The resourcepack includes:
- 2000A Series:
  - Current liveries
    - Blue/white livery
    - Blue/white (inverted door colors)

  - Old 2000 liveries
    - Red livery (100th anniversary)
    - Red livery

  - 2000 pre-series
    - Red/white livery
    - Yellow/white livery

- 2000B Series (aka "Burbuja"):
  - Current liveries
    - Blue/white livery
    - Blue/white (inverted door colors)

You're allowed to modify it, use it in modpack or in servers.
